name: Gseven Co., Ltd.
summary: Gseven Co., Ltd. sells consumer electronic products in Taiwan. The company offers audio, TV projection, health and beauty, digital, and life style products, as well as horn and air conditioning systems, Home theaters, and household and kitchen appliances. It also sells its products through department store counters and outlets. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
